/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/blockchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/rpc_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/dex_scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/dex_pools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/dex_tokens.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/dex_stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/queries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/measure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/arbitrage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/wallet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoZorKDEXArb.dir/src/profit_analyzer.cpp.o -o NeoZorKDEXArb  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd -framework CoreFoundation -framework SystemConfiguration
